expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: historical analogs become required-before-ship gates
expectations.evidence: The run output states the rubric specifies the analog gate requirement but that enforcement is not demonstrably satisfied due to missing Phase 5b artifacts: result.md: "FAIL — checkpoint enforcement is not demonstrably satisfied for 'historical analogs become required-before-ship gates' at Phase 5b" and "we cannot confirm the orchestrator produced the Phase 5b artifacts that actually apply/enforce it"; also notes missing checkpoint_audit/checkpoint_delta/qa_plan_phase5b draft/coverage ledger needed to show [ANALOG-GATE] items.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b

No Phase 5b deliverables (`checkpoint_audit`, `checkpoint_delta`, `qa_plan_phase5b` draft) are present in the benchmark evidence."
